data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Cancellation with retention offers', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is fully covered. While the use case mentions a cancellation attempt triggering an offer of 'Stay and get next month 50% off', it does not provide sufficient detail on how this offer is implemented or if it is consistently applied across different scenarios. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary details to confirm the cancellation process and retention offers are missing.
gaps: Insufficient detail on the implementation of cancellation with retention offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
